human_review_reason: Clear-cut rejection case per CORE RULES 5 and 6. Listing pages are explicitly excluded from archiving. The generated record accurately identifies this as a non-archiveable listing page with no substantive content. No human review needed.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a Bank of England navigation/listing page for the Resolution section covering bank failure procedures and financial stability. It contains links to policy statements (PS9/26, PS10/26, PS11/26 from March 2026) and a speech by Dave Ramsden (January 2026), but does not contain substantive content on its own. The page is not directly relevant to macro catalysts or market structure topics.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This listing page does not contain substantive macro catalyst information. It is a navigation hub for Bank of England's resolution framework documentation. Resolution policy relates to financial stability and regulatory frameworks rather than traditional macro catalysts (rate decisions, GDP releases, inflation data).
